A [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic implant]] that was used during the years reaching the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], the '''Gordulan reaction system''' hyper-stimulated the user's [[nervous system]] allowing for improved reaction time and hand-eye coordination.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
